issue_title: Can't select file by full path on Linux
issue_body:
### Aseprite and System version

* Aseprite version: v1.2.16.3
* System: Linux

When I want to choose a file, if I type in the full path, like `/tmp/test.png`, it will say:

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/10850402/71448687-90264100-2704-11ea-91dc-55cfb244b767.png)

This should not happen.
pr_title: Fix file selector not allowing choosing files by path
pr_body:
Fixes #2228 
Previously was treating path entered into the file selector either as path to a directory, or as a name of the file in current directory. Now allows also for entering path to the file, both relative and absolute.
